steps: Go to https://app.contentful.com and sign in to your account
Select your space from the top-left dropdown (or create one if needed)
Click 'Settings' in the top navigation bar
Select 'API keys' from the settings menu
Click 'Add API key' (or select an existing key to view its details)
Enter a name and optional description for the key
Copy the 'Content Delivery API - access token' from the key details page
Also note your 'Space ID' — both are required for API calls

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Content Delivery API Access Token
credential_fields.description: The CDA access token for read-only content delivery from your Contentful space

notes: Free Community plan available with up to 5 spaces
The Content Delivery API (cdn.contentful.com) is read-only — for write access use the Content Management API
Each space has its own API keys — you must use the key corresponding to your target space
You also need your Space ID for all API requests: https://cdn.contentful.com/spaces/{space_id}/...
Different API keys can be scoped to specific environments (e.g. master, staging)
The setup_url in the manifest points to CMA token creation — for CDA keys use the link above

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve metadata about your Contentful space
